task_completion.description: Log in to Moodle as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle dashboard or site administration page is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., 'admin' profile visible in the top right corner).
The 'Cohorts' page in Site Administration shows a newly created cohort named 'Biology Majors Fall 2025' with the ID number 'BIOMAJ-F25'.

task_completion.description: Add the specified users to the cohort
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cohort member assignment page (Assign, Biology Majors Fall 2025) shows Jane Smith, Michael Jones, Alice Wilson, and Bob Brown in the 'Current users' list on the left side.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the General Chemistry (CHEM101) course
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'General Chemistry' course page or its specific administration/settings pages.

task_completion.description: Configure Cohort sync enrollment method for the course
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enrollment methods' page for the General Chemistry course shows 'Cohort sync' active in the list, specifically linked to the 'Biology Majors Fall 2025' cohort with the role set to 'Student'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Moodle web interface in a browser, rather than using curl or API scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible showing MySQL/MariaDB queries inserting cohorts or enrollments directly into the database.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Moodle application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar and page layout correspond to a live Moodle instance, not a locally edited HTML file or text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Course: General Chemistry (CHEM101). Target Cohort Name: Biology Majors Fall 2025. Target Cohort ID: BIOMAJ-F25. Target Members: Jane Smith (jsmith), Michael Jones (mjones), Alice Wilson (awilson), and Bob Brown (bbrown). Required Enrollment Method: Cohort sync. Required Role: Student.
